ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Continued To Apr-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-11-294501 The Estate of Matsuye Miyamoto Kawase and
PES-14-298170 The Estate of Masami Miyamoto.

Appearances: Alicia Gamez appeared by zoom as the administrator in propria persona.

The court questions why petitions for approval of status reports have not been filed. Ms. Gamez stated that they have not been filed because of her workload, that she is getting it done, that one petition is nearly completed, that the other case is a more complex and interconnected matter which has been open for eleven years, and that she is wrestling with getting them into shape. Ms. Gamez also stated that she should be able to get both petitions on file in the next 10-days or so and also petition for fees of the related trust matter, that she could have filed one of the petitions, but she thought it would be confusing and that it was better to file all of it, that one estate pours into the other estate, but they are sufficiently interrelated and that she didn't want to finalize anything until she went through each one of them. The court stated that it understands the complexity, that it appreciates Ms. Gamez' efforts as the administrator of both estates and trying to get them in order, that based on her representation that she will be able to get this done, it is going to continue these matters for 60-days and that it hopes to have either petitions for final distribution, or petitions for approval of the status reports on file by then. Status on close of estate in both matters are continued to April 5, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-11-294501 Estate of Matsuye Miyamoto Kawase and
PES-14-298170 Estate of Masami Miyamoto.

Appearances: Alicia Gamez appeared by telephone for Kazuko Miyamoto (prior Administrator) and in Propria Persona as the current Administrator.
Deborah Fox appeared by zoom for Hiro Nagamine (Trustee of Mrs. Miyamoto's trust).

The Court waives the notice defects. Ms. Gamez stated that the other Attorneys were given notice as a courtesy and that the only parties entitled to notice are Mr. Nagamine and Ms. Ito because she filed a request for notice. Ms. Fox stated that she acknowledges notice on behalf of her Client. Ms. Gamez stated that she does not think they need much more time, that they are still dealing with Computershare for retitling of the shares and that she sent them a packet three weeks ago. The Court suggested a six-month extension for administration of the estate. The Petitions for Approval of Report on Status of Administration are under submission. Status on close of estates are set for August 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear For Hearing On Whether To Remove Administrator
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-11-294501 Estate of Matsuye Miyamoto Kawase and
PES-14-298170 Estate of Masami Miyamoto.

Appearances: Alicia Gamez appeared by zoom for Kazuko Miyamoto (Administrator) and in Propria Persona as the Petitioner to be the Administrator of the estates.
Deborah Fox appeared by zoom for Hiro Nagimine (Trustee of Kazuko Miyamoto's trust).
Charlotte Ito appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

Ms. Ito stated that she waives formal notice of this hearing. The Court waives deficiency in notice given that it has a signed consent and nomination from Ms. Miyamoto. The Court accepts the resignation of Kazuko Miyamoto. The Court also expressed concern about the road ahead stating that Ms. Gamez is to be very mindful of the dual roles, and the limitations on fees and borders of the dual roles. Ms. Gamez pointed out that Matsuye's estate did have an order for final distribution, but the assets were not marshalled and not distributed. Ms. Gamez also stated that the hold up of Masami's estate is having no one with authority to collect the assets that require a medallion signature, that there are strong claims that need to be attended to and raised the issue of hiring litigation Counsel. Ms. Ito and Ms. Fox indicated that they have no objection to waiving bond. Ms. Gamez stated that she understands that Kazuko's final accounting is due in 60-days. The Court finds that notice is appropriate, noted that no objections have been received and stated that bond will be waived. The Petitions for Letters of Administration (2) are under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petitions. The orders to appear in both matters are off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-17-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were herd: PES-11-294501 Estate of Matsuye Miyamoto Kawase and
PES-14-298170 Estate of Masami Miyamoto.

Appearances: Alicia Gamez appeared by zoom for Kazuko Miyamoto.
Charlotte appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that these matters are on calendar for status on close of the estates and for orders to appear to address the issue of whether to remove the Administrator. Ms. Gamez stated that she tried to get the petitions on for today, but the petitions to appoint another Administrator were filed with a December 7th hearing date and that her Client acknowledges that she is unable to proceed with administering the estates. The Clerk noted that the Petitions for Approval of Report on Status of Administration have been filed with a hearing date of February 1, 2021. Status on close of estates are off calendar. The orders to appear are continued to December 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear For Hearing On Whether To Remove Administrator
Off Calendar Nov-17-2020 Continued To Dec-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Continued To Nov-17-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alicia Gamez, counsel for Kazuko Miyamoto, special administrator (appearing by video conference); Charlotte Kiyomi Ito, Esq., specially appearing (appearing by video conference); Deborah Fox, Esq., counsel for Hiro Magamine, Trustee (appearing by video conference); Jeremy Hauser, Esq., for and with Yuji Matami, former counsel for Kazuko Miyamoto (Mr. Hauser appearing by telephone, Mr. Matami appearing by video conference).

Heard with Estate of Masami Miyamoto, PES-14-298170

The Court notes at the outset that Kazuko Miyamoto was ordered to personally appear at today's hearing. Ms. Gamez advises that Ms. Miyamoto is not able to appear due to her age and the CoVid threat. Additionally, Ms. Miyamoto requires a Japanese interpreter which could not be procured due to the want of appropriate facilities at Ms. Miyamoto's residential care facility.

The Court and Ms. Gamez extensively discuss the ability of Ms. Miyamoto to handle the administration of the several estates, considering the burdens of the same and the factors that gave rise to the temporary conservatorship of Ms. Miyamoto herself.
Ms. Fox notes that Ms. Miyamoto's trust resources are somewhat limited and as she is the primary beneficiary of the several estates before the Court, efficacious resolution of the several estates is of critical importance to the welfare of Ms. Miyamoto.

Mr. Hauser objects for the record to certain characterizations made by Ms. Gamez as to his client, Yuji Matami, former counsel for Kazuko Miyamoto.

After further discussion, the Court suspends the powers of Kazuko Miyamoto as Special Administrator of the Estate of Matsuye Miyamoto Kawase, PES-11-294501 and as Administrator of the Estate of Masami Miyamoto, PES-14-298170. The Court sets hearing for November 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for Kazuko Miyamoto to show cause why she should not be removed as Special Administrator of the Estate of Matsuye Miyamoto Kawase, PES-11-294501 and as Administrator of the Estate of Masami Miyamoto, PES-14-298170.

Upon inquiry from Mr. Hauser, the Court determines that Mr. Matami need not appear at the November 17th hearing.

The Court continues the current matters to November 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Johnson. (D204)

Counsel was advised to contact the Probate Examiner to determine the manner in which to proceed with respect to appointment of a Probate Referree.
